data.content: Fixed duplicate OpenRouter model registration that caused Devmistral/OpenRouter entries to appear twice in settings dropdowns. Added schema-level deduplication for openrouter.agents, prevented duplicate model additions in the OpenRouter panel, and limited legacy openrouter:selected options to active legacy mappings in dispatch UI. Added regression tests for schema and settings load deduplication; lint/tsc/tests/build passed (build under NODE_ENV=production).
